slides.heading: You've Done It!
slides.content: You've finished the core lessons of Unit 1. Let's do a quick mental check.

slides.heading: Grammar Check
slides.content: Do you remember where the verb goes? (Hint: The end!). Can you use 'wa'?

slides.heading: Script Check
slides.content: Can you recognize あ, い, and う? If not, revisit the Reading lesson.

slides.heading: Daily Habit
slides.content: Consistency is better than intensity. 10 minutes every day is better than 2 hours once a week.

slides.heading: Next Steps
slides.content: Once you feel ready, go to the Practice section to earn some XP and test your skills!
